changes: Replaced Header with ScreenHeader (borderless, bg-app). Preview area uses bg-sunken with centered SharePreview in rounded-[22px] shadow-card wrapper. Options body uses er-grouplabel-style labels (font-body 11px bold uppercase tracking-[.05em] text-fg-3) for FORMATO, O QUE INCLUIR, and TEMA sections. Toggle rows in a rounded-[14px] bg-surface shadow-sm card with border-t separators, using font-body 15px semibold labels matching the print. Bottom dock with Salvar (secondary) and Compartilhar (primary) buttons fixed at bottom. All hooks, navigation, state, and data logic preserved unchanged.
